zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Helena Butler於1575年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪時，她的父親Pierce Butler21歲，母親Catherine Fleming19歲。她於大約1598年與Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克卡斯特萊托 比阿哈文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Helena Butler于1575年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪时，她的父亲Pierce Butler21岁，母亲Catherine Fleming19岁。她于大约1598年与Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara在爱尔兰庫迪 科克卡斯特萊托 比阿哈文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Helena Butler was born in 1575, in Ardee, County Louth, Ireland, her father, Pierce Butler, was 21 and her mother, Catherine Fleming, was 19. She married Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara about 1598, in Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1616, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Helena Butler est née en 1575, à Ardee, County Louth, Irlande, son père, Pierce Butler, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Catherine Fleming, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara environ 1598, à Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Helena Butler 1575 in Ardee, County Louth, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierce Butler 21 und ihre Mutter Catherine Fleming 19. Sie hat um 1598 in Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Irland Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1616 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helena Butler è nata il nel 1575 nel Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, sua padre, Pierce Butler, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Catherine Fleming, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara circa 1598, nel Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Helena Butlerが1575年にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスアルディーで生まれた時，父Pierce Butlerは21歳，母Catherine Flemingは19歳であった。約1598年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクカストレトウン ビールヘイベンでSir Owen O'Sullivan Bearaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年に故郷で41歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Helena Butler(이)가 1575년 아일랜드 카운티 루스 아디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierce Butler(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Fleming(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1598년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 카스틀레타운 브이어하븐에서 Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helena Butler nasceu em 1575, em Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, seu pai, Pierce Butler, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Fleming, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara aproximadamente 1598, em Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Helena Butler родилась в 1575 г. в местности арди, коунти лоут, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Pierce Butler было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Fleming, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara около 1598 г. в местности кастлетоун биравен, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1616 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Helena Butler nació en 1575, en Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, su papá, Pierce Butler, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Catherine Fleming, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara aproximadamente 1598, en Castletown Bearhaven, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1616, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Irlanda.
